# Subdirectories

# Sources
target_sources(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
  "base-rb.cpp"
  "core-rb.cpp"
  "hal-rb.cpp"
  "mat-rb.cpp"
  "matx-rb.cpp"
  "persistence-rb.cpp"
  "types-rb.cpp"
)
if("opencv_cudaarithm" IN_LIST OpenCV_LIB_COMPONENTS)
  target_sources(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
    "cuda-rb.cpp"
  )
endif()
if("opencv_dnn" IN_LIST OpenCV_LIB_COMPONENTS)
  target_sources(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
    "dnn-rb.cpp"
  )
endif()
